_comment: SHRINE REVEAL — a generic atmospheric intro reused across the five elemental shrines (like leader_intro is reused across gyms). relative+facingFrame: the camera drifts forward and up into the chamber the player is entering, then settles on the space ahead, ominous and slow. Trigger from each shrine's begin-trial with 'cutscene play shrine_reveal', and show the specific nameplate right after with a title command (e.g. title @s title {"text":"Fire Shrine",...}). For a TRUE cave fly-through to a specific statue, record an absolute-coord scene per shrine with /cutscene record and drop it in as fire_shrine_reveal.json etc. — this generic one keeps every shrine covered until then.

cues.subtitle: §7Prove yourself worthy of the guardian within.
